narrative: Mid-size manufacturer: the MES/weighbridge system pushes scale tickets over RFC (ZCL_GM_SCALE_RFC_STUB) into ZGM_SCALE_TICKET; ZCL_GM_MOVEMENT_SERVICE validates materials and posts goods receipts via BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE, writing the custom audit log ZGM_MOVEMENT_LOG (also fed by user-exit ZXMBCU01 for movements posted outside the feed). Reporting: daily reconciliation against MKPF/MSEG, a pricing margin report on KONV/VBUK, and an FI open-item aging list on BSID/BSAD. Two legacy programs (MB01 batch-input posting, desktop CSV upload) were superseded years ago and are dead code.
note: usage.csv is generated by `npm run gen-usage` — deterministic, seeded; call_count_24m = f(inbound_edge_count, object_type), dead objects forced to 0. Usage data for this workspace is SIMULATED and labeled as such on every surface. The hold-out object is authored only in Phase 6, after rules and validators are frozen.

objects.name: ZCL_GM_MATNR_COMPAT
objects.description: Legacy material-number normalization for MES barcodes (hold-out object, authored after rules/validators freeze)

objects.name: ZIF_GM_MOVEMENT_TYPES
objects.description: Shared types/constants for the goods-movement flow

objects.name: ZCL_GM_SCALE_RFC_STUB

objects.description: Core service: tickets → BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE → audit log

objects.description: Read-only stock and movement lookups (MARD, MSEG)
